claim.statement: Handle offline and low-connectivity states gracefully: communicate connection status non-blockingly, let users keep working where feasible by queuing actions, and replay the queue in order and idempotently when connectivity returns. Surface permanent sync failures clearly.

limitations: Queue ordering, idempotency, and conflict resolution are non-trivial and domain-specific

do: Show a subtle, non-blocking connectivity indicator
Queue user actions offline and replay them in creation order when online
Make replayed requests idempotent and surface permanent failures to the user
avoid: Blocking modals that halt all work when the network drops
Silently discarding actions taken while offline

strategies: add idempotency keys and retry policy
